description:
➔ Collaborated with a talented team to develop innovative AI applications, including an AI Chatbot, AI Copilot, AI Writing Assistant, and AI Knowledge Base. 
 ➔ Analyzed competitors, assessed their products, and partnered with stakeholders to create a SaaS solution that enhances customer support.

➔ Set up codebases for projects, reviewed and managed pull requests, and worked on improving code quality to ensure clean and efficient development. 
 ➔ Led multiple teams of junior developers, mentoring them to boost productivity and deliver results efficiently.

➔ Developed an E-Commerce SaaS platform for Printing and Custom Decoration businesses to manage their contacts (CRM), orders, purchasing, organize designs, and improve their workflow. 
 ➔ Worked closely with an amazing team to ensure the delivery of Top-notch Solutions. 
 ➔ Transformed Figma designs into fully functional, real-world applications.

➔ Developed 10+ MVPs for Clients with expertise in building Chatbots, Audio Social Media Platform, and E-Commerce Platform with Scraped data. 
 ➔ Worked closely with Clients to meet their requirements.
